case_title: SETO, GOCK KIN et al VS CHENG, LOUIS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-23-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-16-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ THE REMAINING PAYMENTS NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARIES ON 4-16-03 @ 10 AM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION W/ PREJUDICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,478.50 FILED BY SETO, GOCK KIN SETO, LAI FUN AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, LOUIS LI, KATHERINE CHUEN YEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-22-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-22-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-23-2002 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 10-23-02 @ 10 AM & THE COURT CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 5 MONTHS.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHENG, LOUIS LI, KATHERINE CHUEN YEE PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
